basic_details.job_title: Mizoram University Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 10 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Mizoram University has published the Guest Faculty Notification 2026 on the official website. The recruitment drive aims to fill 10 Guest Faculty positions across MBA, M.A, B.A, B.Com, and BBA programs. Candidates holding qualifications as prescribed for regular Assistant Professors of Universities/Colleges in the UGC/AICTE/NCTE/COA/RCI Regulations (Ph.D. preferred) are eligible to apply via email. The application process is active until 24 May 2026, and candidates can easily access the official notification PDF and application instructions below.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Same as prescribed for regular Assistant Professors of Universities/Colleges in the UGC/AICTE/NCTE/COA/RCI Regulations as applicable, Ph.D. shall be given preference
qualification.details: Guest Faculty - MBA (Logistics & Supply Chain Management, Entrepreneurship, Big Data Analytics, Human Resource Management, Financial Management, Marketing Management): Same as prescribed for regular Assistant Professors of Universities/Colleges in UGC/AICTE/NCTE/COA/RCI Regulations. Guest Faculty - M.A Sociology: Same as prescribed for regular Assistant Professors of Universities/Colleges in UGC/AICTE/NCTE/COA/RCI Regulations. Ph.D. preferred. Guest Faculty - B.A Education: Same as prescribed for regular Assistant Professors of Universities/Colleges in UGC/AICTE/NCTE/COA/RCI Regulations. Ph.D. preferred. Guest Faculty - B.Com: Same as prescribed for regular Assistant Professors of Universities/Colleges in UGC/AICTE/NCTE/COA/RCI Regulations. Ph.D. preferred. Guest Faculty - BBA: Same as prescribed for regular Assistant Professors of Universities/Colleges in UGC/AICTE/NCTE/COA/RCI Regulations. Ph.D. preferred.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Guest Faculty - MBA (Logistics & Supply Chain Management, Entrepreneurship, Big Data Analytics, Human Resource Management, Financial Management, Marketing Management)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Mizoram University Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 24-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Guest Faculty positions at Mizoram University?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Guest Faculty positions at Mizoram University is 24th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many Guest Faculty vacancies are available at Mizoram University?
faq.answer: Mizoram University is recruiting for a total of 10 Guest Faculty positions across various departments.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application process for these Guest Faculty roles?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply by sending their complete application via email to the designated address mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Guest Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Guest Faculty positions will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 36,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. What are the minimum educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: The qualifications are the same as prescribed for regular Assistant Professors of Universities/Colleges in UGC/AICTE/NCTE/COA/RCI Regulations. A Ph.D. is preferred.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for these Guest Faculty positions?
faq.answer: These positions are on a contract basis, meaning they are temporary appointments.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for Mizoram University Guest Faculty recruitment?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification on the Mizoram University's official website, www.mzu.edu.in, and a direct link will be provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Guest Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves shortlisting of candidates based on their applications, followed by an interview if scheduled.

faq.question: Q10. Does Mizoram University provide age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Information regarding age relaxation is not explicitly detailed in the provided data. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for specific details.
